zh.lifeSummary: 當William Carpenter於1464年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾時，他的父親William Carpenter of Homme24歲，母親Lady Agnes Homme20歲。他於大約1484年與Agnes在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1547年7月11日在英國維爾爾查爾頓 聖 彼得享年83歲。

nameMeanings.name: Carpenter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): occupational name for a worker in wood, Norman French carpentier (from Late Latin carpentarius ‘cartwright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Zimmermann  , French   Charpentier  , Italian   Carpentieri  , or cognates and equivalents in various other languages.

variants.name: Zimmermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Fritz, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Gerd, Manfred, Wolfgang, Bernhard.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a carpenter, Middle High German zimberman (a compound of zimber, zim(m)er ‘timber, wood’ + man ‘man’), German Zimmermann.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Carpenter was born in 1464, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Carpenter of Homme, was 24 and his mother, Lady Agnes Homme, was 20. He married Agnes about 1484, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 11 July 1547, in Charlton St Peter, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 83.

ko.Charlton-All-Saints, Wiltshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 찰턴 앨 세인츠
ko.lifeSummary: William Carpenter(이)가 1464년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Carpenter of Homme(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes Homme(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1484년 영국에서 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1547년 7월 11일 영국 윌츠히르 찰턴 스트 피터에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Agnes aproximadamente 1484, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de julho de 1547, em Charlton St Peter, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 83 anos.

ru.Charlton-All-Saints, Wiltshire, England: чарлтон алл сеинц, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Carpenter родился в 1464 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Carpenter of Homme было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Homme, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes около 1484 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 11 июля 1547 г. в местности чарлтон ст питир, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет.
